sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamp_test (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamp_test (id, event_time) VALUES (1, epoch_ms(701222400000));
UPDATE timestamp_test SET event_time = epoch_ms(1609459200000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM timestamp_test WHERE event_time > epoch_ms(1622505600000);
DELETE FROM timestamp_test WHERE event_time < epoch_ms(1114531200000);
